text: Travel and expense policy reminder: hotel spend in Stockholm is capped at 220 EUR per night and receipts need to be filed within 10 days after travel.
Please stick to the updated support service levels. Sev-1 issues need acknowledgement within 15 minutes and status updates every 30 minutes until mitigation.
Hybrid work policy is now active. Teams are expected in office at least 2 days per week unless a manager-approved exemption is in place.
Security review requests should come through me first. Standard turnaround for the initial questionnaire review is 5 business days.
Office directory is updated. Current office addresses are Sveavägen 44 in Stockholm, 77 Kingsway in London, and 12 Rue de Rivoli in Paris.
Leadership team page is current: Jonas is covering finance approvals, Lina owns product planning, Mikael owns operations, and Nora is leading people programs.
Customer training catalog is ready to use. Standard analyst training is a 90-minute remote session for groups up to 30.
Board meeting schedule is locked in. Internal board deck review is due March 18 and the Q1 board meeting remains on March 23.
Reminder: the Northwind renewal call is now on March 10 at 14:00 with Sofia and Jonas.
The Stockholm office Wi-Fi maintenance is scheduled for March 10 from 06:00 to 07:30. Expect short interruptions.
Project Aurora beta has been pushed to April 2. QA sign-off is still pending from Lina.
Helio Dynamics reported that export jobs time out for reports over 50k rows. I logged it as bug BUG-184.
Please note that invoices above 25000 EUR need CFO approval before sending.
Welcome to Sara Nordin, who joined as Customer Success Manager on March 1.
BluePeak Foods asked whether we can provide SSO before their July renewal. I told them it is on the roadmap but not committed.
Board prep deck is due internally by March 18. Final board meeting stays on March 23.
The new data processing addendum template is approved. Use DPA-v3 for all EU customers starting today.
Customer webinar title is now 'Scaling analytics with fewer dashboards'. Target date is April 14.
Acme Industrial wants pricing for 300 seats. Their procurement contact is Diego Ruiz.
Reminder that Sev-1 incidents must be acknowledged within 15 minutes according to the support policy.
Usage Alerts will not make the April release. It has moved to the May sprint due to notification service work.
Northwind Traders expanded from 120 to 150 seats in the revised quote.
London office fire drill will happen March 12 at 15:00 local time.
Travel receipts must be submitted within 10 days after the trip ends.
I spoke with Terra Logistics. Their main risk is slow onboarding for warehouse managers in Germany.
Resolved BUG-184 in staging. Waiting for Helio Dynamics to validate the fix.
Hybrid policy reminder: employees are expected in office at least 2 days per week unless exempted by manager.
Please keep the April 6 strategy offsite materials confidential until after the leadership sync.
CloudCore Labs is asking for a security review. Priya Menon from our security team will coordinate with their security contact, Sam Wallace.
The Q2 campaign slogan is 'Make every metric actionable'. Please do not use last quarter's tagline anymore.
Congrats to the support team for reaching 94 percent CSAT in February.
For Aurora beta access, use the feature flag aurora_beta_enabled.
BluePeak Foods reported duplicate notifications from Usage Alerts in the preview environment.
Acme Industrial legal review is blocked until they receive the signed DPA-v3.
The Paris office kitchen renovation starts March 20 and should last one week.
Maple Bank requested training for 25 analysts during the week of March 30.
Northwind renewal call is tomorrow at 14:00. Jonas will join for pricing.
Reminder that FY27 planning assumptions are due from department heads by April 1.
